project_type: CSS-only framework (no build step for consumers)
build_system: node scripts/bundle.js - concatenates core/ + optional/ into dist/ bundles
test_framework: Playwright regression suite (tests/), stylelint for linting
verification_instructions: 1. npm run lint:css must pass. 2. npm run build must rebuild dist/ successfully. Tests require browser install (npm run test:install + npm test) but lint+build is sufficient for docs-only changes.
snapshot_or_generated_files: dist/ bundles are regenerated by npm run build and must be committed. docs/tokens.md is generated by npm run docs:tokens.
setup_instructions: npm ci to install dev deps; no build step needed for CSS consumption
environment_constraints: No Playwright browsers pre-installed; lint and build are the primary verification. This task only modifies docs and a CSS comment header, so lint:css is the key check.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits required. dist/ must be rebuilt and committed. New .sf-* classes must appear in demo.html (but we are only documenting existing classes, not adding new ones).
key_patterns: Docs use markdown with ## sections, code blocks, and token tables. The tokens.css header comment uses a specific indented format with bullet points (middle dot character). Layout docs use a table format with Class/What it does/Key tokens columns.
relevant_files: docs/states.md (add cross-reference notes for classes that live in accessibility.css)
directory_structure: core/ = CSS source files (tokens, layout, macros, states, motion, accessibility). docs/ = markdown documentation. dist/ = bundled output. scripts/ = Node tooling. tests/ = Playwright specs.
